tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-FileUpload"
        set uuid e6d7f420-2b54-51f1-1492-df1374bc9d05
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-Grp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set service "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-FileUpload"
        set uuid e6d7f420-2b54-51f1-1492-df1374bc9d05
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-Grp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
